identity.name: Kara Business Service
identity.persona: The 'Architect' of Property Management - structured, elegant, invisible but essential.

primary.description: Deep Navy - represents authority and stability

accent.description: Muted Teal - represents growth and calmness

hero_section.description: Left: Bold typography 'Gestion Immobilière Sans Souci'. Right: High-quality interior image with a floating 'Success Card'.
hero_section.interaction: Fade-in up for text, Parallax scroll for image.

services_grid.cards: Minimalist cards with thin borders, ample padding (p-8), and muted icons. Hover: border-accent transition-colors duration-300.

benefits_section.description: Large typography on one side, illustrative image on the other. Alternating pattern. Focus on 'Peace of Mind' and 'Profitability'.

chatbot_widget.description: A friendly AI avatar that expands into a chat window.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-12 px-8 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide border border-transparent hover:border-border transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white h-12 px-8 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide transition-all

cards.service: bg-white p-8 border border-border/50 hover:border-accent/50 transition-colors duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: h-12 bg-white border-border/60 focus:border-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent rounded-sm px-4 transition-all

images.alt: Modern bright luxury living room interior
Relaxed person with headphones in apartment
Hand holding keys to new apartment
images.usage: Call to Action section or Success indicator

key_phrases.hero_subhead: Kara Business Service transforme la gestion locative. Plus de revenus, moins de stress, une transparence totale.
key_phrases.chatbot_welcome: Bonjour! Je suis l'assistant Kara. Comment puis-je vous aider avec votre propriété aujourd'hui?

implementation_steps: Step 1: Setup Tailwind config with 'Manrope' and 'Playfair Display' fonts and the specific color palette.
Step 2: Create the 'Navbar' with a glassmorphism effect (sticky top).
Step 3: Build the 'Hero' section using the 'Modern living room' image and a high-contrast text block.
Step 4: Develop the 'Services' section using a responsive Bento Grid (CSS Grid).
Step 5: Implement the 'ContactForm' component using Shadcn Input/Label/Button.
Step 6: Integrate the 'AIChatbot' widget (mocked interface) floating in the bottom right.
Step 7: Create the 'Footer' with clean links and social icons.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text or buttons; keep them solid and high-contrast.
Ensure all images have 'object-cover' and 'grayscale-0' (full color) but can use a subtle overlay for text readability.
Use 'motion.div' from framer-motion for entrance animations (fade-up, stagger-children).
All interactive elements must have a 'data-testid' attribute.
Respect the whitespace. Do not crowd elements. Use 'py-24' or 'py-32' for section spacing.
